screen.specialities.skills.source.mining: Breaking stone and ore blocks with a pickaxe. Rarer ores give much more.
screen.specialities.skills.source.woodcu: Chopping down logs of any wood type.
screen.specialities.skills.source.harves: Breaking fully grown crops — wheat, carrots, potatoes, nether wart, melons, pumpkins.
screen.specialities.skills.source.excava: Digging dirt, sand, gravel, clay and soul soil with a shovel.
screen.specialities.skills.source.fishin: Reeling in a catch with a fishing rod.
screen.specialities.skills.source.combat: Dealing damage with any weapon — melee or ranged. Trains alongside Arms Mastery and Archery.
screen.specialities.skills.source.arms_m: Dealing damage with swords, spears, tridents or maces.
screen.specialities.skills.source.archer: Dealing damage with a bow or crossbow.
screen.specialities.skills.source.sneaki: Sneaking near hostile mobs that haven't noticed you.
screen.specialities.skills.source.smithi: Crafting tools, weapons and armor, and smelting metal. Rarer materials give much more.
screen.specialities.skills.source.alchem: Brewing potions at a brewing stand.
screen.specialities.skills.source.enchan: Enchanting items at an enchanting table. Higher level enchants give more.
tooltip.specialities.damage: +%s%% damage on melee swings, arrows and thrown tridents
tooltip.specialities.next_sweep: Next Sweeping Edge bonus at level %s
tooltip.specialities.heavy_armor: Heavy armor: -25%% of the bonus per piece
tooltip.specialities.stealth_crit: Stealth crit x%s melee, x%s arrows (once per enemy)
tooltip.specialities.resourcefulness: %s%% chance to recover materials when crafting gear
tooltip.specialities.enchant_discount: %s%% chance enchants cost half the XP
tooltip.specialities.enchant_luck: %s%% chance for a bonus or upgraded enchantment
config.specialities.title: Skill Proficiencies
config.specialities.combatDamageMaxBonus: Extra weapon damage at combat level 100, as a fraction. 0.5 = +50% (x1.5). Set to 1.0 for the old +100% (x2.0).
config.specialities.attackSpeedMaxReduct: Fraction of attack-recovery / bow-draw time removed at level 100. 0.3 = ~1.4x faster. Set to 0.5 for the old 2x faster.
Extra block-breaking speed at mining level 100, as a fraction. 1.0 = +100% (x2.0).
config.specialities.luckLevelsPerBonus.t: Skill levels required for each +1 passive Fortune/Looting. Lower = luck comes faster. Default 20.
config.specialities.xpRateMultiplier.too: Multiplier on all skill XP gains. 1.0 = normal, 2.0 = double, 0.0 = disabled.
